## Summary

Describe the user-visible problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Changes

-

## Validation

List exact commands and results. Label each proof layer honestly: offline, fixture-backed,
real-model, GPU, serving, hosted, or production.

- [ ] Focused tests passed
- [ ] Full relevant checks passed
- [ ] Documentation or examples changed with the behavior

## Safety and provenance

- [ ] No credentials, personal data, private tickets, or model weights are included
- [ ] Dataset and model-license effects are documented or not applicable
- [ ] Generated artifacts remain ignored or are small, sanitized summaries
- [ ] Network access, hardware, and unexecuted proof layers are stated explicitly

## Reviewer notes

Call out compatibility risks, migration needs, intentionally deferred work, and the smallest useful
review path.
